title: Senior AI Engineer – Intelligent Automation
company_focus: Global medical technology and digital solutions innovator
description:
Job Description SummaryWe’re looking for a Senior AI
Engineer to lead the architecture and development of AI
powered automations that improve speed, quality, and
scalability across our business. You will design reference
architectures, build secure and performant services, and
productionize solutions that combine LLMs, classical ML,
RPA/workflow, and enterprise systems. This role bridges
solution architecture with hands on engineering - you’ll set
technical direction, ship code, and mentor others. You will
work closely with engineering, data science, operations, and
business stakeholders to define and deliver robust
automation solutions that enhances operational efficiency,
customer experience, and business agility. You will be at
the forefront of transforming how we manage and scale our
subscriptions business. Work with a passionate, cross-
functional team in a fast-paced, innovative environment. You
will have opportunity to shape a mission-critical platform
from the ground up. GE HealthCare is a leading global
medical technology and digital solutions innovator. Our
purpose is to create a world where healthcare has no limits.
Unlock your ambition, turn ideas into world-changing
realities, and join an organization where every voice makes
a difference, and every difference builds a healthier world.

Job Description

Key Responsibilities:

In this role you will

- Own end‑to‑end AI automation architectures: ingestion →
  orchestration → model inference → human‑in‑the‑loop →
  monitoring & feedback loops.
- Design and implement AI automation solutions leveraging
  Microsoft Power Platform and AWS Bedrock, including
  defining RAG patterns, tool/function calling, prompt
  management, evaluation frameworks, and selecting services
  and reference designs across Azure and AWS for secure,
  scalable deployments.
- Develop APIs, microservices, and integration layers for
  enterprise systems (ERP, CRM, ITSM).
- Integrate AI solutions with RPA platforms (Power Automate,
  UiPath) and business applications.
- Contribute to internal frameworks, reusable components, and
  coding standards.
- Lead design reviews, threat modelling, and post‑incident
  reviews.
- Document architectures, runbooks, and knowledge articles;
  enable Ops for smooth handover.
- Collaborate with Product/Business to identify automation
  opportunities and shape roadmaps and success metrics.
- Establish guardrails, safety, privacy, and governance (PII
  handling, data minimization, prompt/content safety, model
  versioning, auditability).

Skill Requirements:

- Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in computer science,
  Engineering, or a related technical field.
- 5+ years of software engineering experience, with hands-on
  development in AI, frontend and backend technologies.
- Experience building AI/ML or LLM-based applications in
  production.
- Strong knowledge of Azure services (Azure OpenAI, Functions,
  AKS, API Management) and AWS services (Bedrock, Lambda,
  API Gateway).
- Familiarity with RPA tools (Power Automate, UiPath) and
  enterprise integrations.
- Understanding of cloud security, identity management, and
  data privacy.
- Proficiency in CI/CD pipelines, Docker, and container
  orchestration.

Additional Skills:

- Experience with Power Platform (Power Automate, Power Apps)
- Knowledge of subscription lifecycle management, supply
  chain, services, billing systems, and customer retention
  strategies.
- Exposure to AI/ML-driven alerting or anomaly detection
  systems.

Inclusion and Diversity:

GE HealthCare is an Equal Opportunity Employer where
inclusion matters. Employment decisions are made without
regard to race, colour, religion, national or ethnic origin,
sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age,
disability, protected veteran status or other
characteristics protected by law. We expect all employees to
live and breathe our behaviours: to act with humility and
build trust; lead with transparency; deliver with focus, and
drive ownership – always with unyielding integrity. Our
total rewards are designed to unlock your ambition by giving
you the boost and flexibility you need to turn your ideas
into world-changing realities. Our salary and benefits are
everything you’d expect from an organization with global
strength and scale, and you’ll be surrounded by career
opportunities in a culture that fosters care, collaboration
and support.

Additional Information

Relocation Assistance Provided: Yes

Integrate AI solutions with RPA platforms such as Power Automate and UiPath and business applications

use_cases: Intelligent automation for enterprise business processes
Operational efficiency improvements across healthcare business operations
Customer experience enhancement through AI-powered workflows
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves hands-on building and deploying AI
systems - specifically architecting LLM-based solutions with
RAG patterns, function calling, and prompt management, plus
owning the full pipeline from ingestion to model inference.
The engineer will productionize AI solutions combining LLMs
and ML models, not just support infrastructure.
